headline: ClearBridge Large Cap Growth Strategy Sold Equinix (EQIX) as Capital Investment Delays AI Gains
summary: ClearBridge Investments, a global equity manager, recently published first-quarter 2026 commentary for its “Large Cap Growth Strategy”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. Following the outbreak of the Middle East conflict, the market experienced a significant decline in growth stocks, resulting in substantial losses. In the quarter, the S&P 500 Index fell 4.3% […]

headline: Assessing Equinix (EQIX) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Recent performance snapshot for Equinix Equinix (EQIX) has drawn investor attention after a period of strong share price performance, with the stock recently closing at US$1,017.66 and recording gains over the past week, month and past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Equinix. Beyond the latest move, Equinix’s share price has posted a 30.16% 3 month share price return and a year to date share price return of 33.18%, while the 1 year total shareholder return sits at 30.58%, indicating...
